review_text: Hubby and I spent four nights in a cabin at the park last week.  The cabin was one of the mid-range ones, with two bedrooms and a decent sized living area.  It was very comfortable for two with room to spread out.  It had all we needed for our basic cooking needs, as we ate out much of the time.  The AC warmed the place up nicely on the coolest night.  |As it wasn't school holidays and mid-May, the park was quiet and not at all crowded.  The facilities for families seem to be great.  I wish I'd brought my bathers so I could use the indoor pool.  We chose the park because it was right on the beach and this was great.  We could walk there any time.  |We would happily stay here again, although probably not during school holidays.
호주 로드트립중 최고의 경험입니다. 캥거루와 함께하는 숙박은 평생 소중한 추억이 되었습니다. 팜불라 비치와 메림블라 근처 호수들도 너무 예뻐요. 밤하늘에는 은하수도!!! 연인, 가족 모두에게 너무나 추천하는 곳 입니다. 진짜 대박이에요!!!

What a great caravan park,  right by the beach. Plenty of showers and toilet blocks.
Lovely little Cafe and general store by the entrance. Can recommend the fish and chips.
We will be back.
Van site on the front row and could see and hear the ocean.

Wow wow wow what a beautiful place to stay
Facility we’re absolutely so clean a big credit to the cleaning staff
Such a peaceful place and so close to the beach staff on check in we’re absolutely amazing hopefully we shall return again soon
Glenn and Carole
Wonderful, we arrived after office hours to arrive at our cabin to find the lights on and the heater going. Perfect. Park amenities are great also, everything you could want.
Had a lovely stay, friendly staff, great location. Hope to come again!

Right on the beach at Pambula. Flat grassy sites. Bit of a squeeze lengthwise for our 9.5 mt van but doable. Water and power hookup. $73 per night with a Discovery Parks discount. Has a pool and separate water park for kids. TV room, games room, camp kitchen, laundry and bbq’s. Good clean amenities. Kangaroos aplenty. Walk through bushes and you’re directly on the beach. Would defs stay again and hopefully cheaper next time

Me and my family went here so mu h fun went like 7yrs ago cut my foot in the pool then I got to rife and do news papers wither staff and my sis in the golf cart thing one big hail storm but overall good place
Beautiful beach, easy access to amenities and a kid friendly pool.
Great spot to stay with the van
Peaceful friendly place. Cafe staff were great. It was a nice place to chill, walk on the beach and enjoy the wildlife such as the kangaroos

We stayed here in a caravan. I absolutely loved it here and didn't want to leave.
It's such an easy park to get around, and the beach is right there. Loved the pool.
Great amenities, clean and easy to get to.

Great location! Directly at the beach!
Wake up, go to surf!
Clean and nice amenities. Well equiped
Kitchen! Would recommend and definitely come again!
Every thing very good

Sehr nett empfangen worden. Der Campingplatz ist sehr sauber, sei es das Pool, die Campkitchen etc. Unser Ensuit war ebenfalls sehr sauber. Der Zugang zum Meer ist super. Die Kangaroos auf dem Platz haben uns sehr gut gefallen. Es hat einen kleinen Shop mit den nötigsten Sachen wie ein kleines Bistro.

傍晚袋鼠超多可以近距離互動，海灘就在旁邊
早上可以走走看看日出

We had a great week at the park and the weather was brilliant. Toilets were ok but we did smell a strong effluent smell around the toilet block. One thing we could not work out was with such a huge park they crammed vans into the same locations rather than spacing them out more so they have clumps of vans when there was loads of space elsewhere.  This made it difficult to get in and out and even park your car next to your van.
I absolutely loved this place. If you're looking for mini getaway with kids, definitely come here no doubts.

I am extremely disappointed with our experience at this caravan park. After a long drive from Sydney, we arrived on Saturday to find the cabin unbearably hot. The air conditioning was completely non-functional, and one of the beds had no sheets provided. We reported these issues immediately upon arrival. Unfortunately, the manager showed little concern for our situation. She appeared indifferent and offered a series of excuses rather than taking responsibility or acting promptly. We were left waiting for over an hour with no meaningful resolution. Ultimately, the only solution offered was a fan, which was entirely inadequate given the extreme heat. Due to these conditions, it was impossible for us to stay. As we were travelling with young children, the situation was both unsafe and unsuitable, leaving us with no choice but to leave without staying the night. Overall, this was a very poor and deeply disappointing experience. This property failed to meet even the most basic standards of comfort, responsibility, and customer service. I would not recommend this caravan park to others, particularly families.
Lovely spot. Very family friendly. Relaxing
Awesome park right on the beach with heaps of wildlife and water fun

We’ve visited here every year for the past four years and it’s easily our favourite. We’ve come with our own caravan each time and stayed on an ensuite site for three of those visits. We’ve also stayed around Eden, Marlo and Narooma, but this place tops the list.

The park really has something for all ages. The staff are incredibly helpful and accommodating, there’s an onsite shop plus a café/restaurant, and while it’s a bit of a walk, you can walk up into town if you’re keen. The kids love riding their bikes around the park, and I’m a big fan of the bakery runs 😄

There’s a river close by, a patrolled beach nearby, kids’ activities, and plenty of wildlife throughout the park, which always adds to the experience.

The only real downside is that fires aren’t allowed and heat beads can’t be used for spit roasts. Other than that, the biggest problem is there’s never enough days to stay.

Good tip for tent campers: you can organise a fridge to rent for the duration of your stay. It’s external to the park but an absolute cracker of an idea—especially if you stock up on fresh seafood from the ute that drives through the park like an ice-cream truck.
Enjoy 🙂
And don’t forget, Magic Mountain is just up the road—a special treat for the little people… but ONLY if they behave 😉

My husband and I stayed at this caravan park and the location itself is absolutely beautiful. The kangaroos, the beach access, and the overall surroundings were amazing and very relaxing.

Unfortunately, the only downside was the condition of the shared toilets and kitchen areas. This is not the fault of the cleaning staff they are clearly doing their best. The issue is the behaviour of some guests staying at the park. My husband and I personally witnessed people walking out of the toilets without washing their hands, despite there being many children staying at the park. This is extremely concerning and sets a very poor example for children’s health and hygiene. In the kitchen areas, food was also being left in the sinks.

It’s disappointing to see such a beautiful place not being respected by some visitors. With more consideration from guests, this caravan park would be perfect.

This is one of the best places. Right next to the beach with kangaroos between campers. We stayed in one of their cabins. Clean, modern. Great facilities, friendly staff, nice pool, kids areas, a little restaurant and shop, outstanding. Overall - highly recommended.

Was a good stay with all the welcome kangaroos!  Only down side is the everything shut down so early, and open late in the morning for the kids, playground was ment to open at 8am but there was a lock and reception opens at 9am..

Great location. We got a site on the edge of the park that lead into the bush. The facilities were well maintained. The beach is stunning and a good location. The cafe on site was quite nice. Would definitely visit again.
Always love coming here, great spot and facilities available.

What an awesome stay we had…
Perfect for kids, so much wildlife, friendly team at reception, cabin was clean and comfy
Can’t wait to come back

My partner, three kids and I just stayed at Pambula Discovery Park for a few nights and we absolutely loved it. The slab ensuite site was perfect for our stay and even included a storage room which was so handy. The kids loved the pool, splash zone, games room and the endless encounters with the wildlife (kangaroos, echidnas, goannas). Plus the beach is a short walk which is beautiful. The amenities were clean and well maintained. I would rate Pambula Discovery Park my favourite that we have stayed at and can't wait to return.

Very obliging reception staff and a reason price for this outstanding park - direct beach access, pool, convenient store and children’s playground all for $40 better than those we didn’t stay at - wise decision

Disappointing stay! No internet. When I enquired they said it was limited and the whole south coast was the same. I have stayed in many places on the south coast and everywhere had phone service and internet. Asked three times  if we could have a cabin facing the beach but we’re denied as we were told we had only booked one night so we got put at the back of deluxe cabins facing a family at the front of us. For $170 a night with no service and internet and behind another cabin there was nothing “deluxe” about it.
The area is pretty and beach nice. We wanted to stay a few nights but changed our mind after netflix stopping constantly and being stuck with no view. So disappointed with service and the price for what you got. To top it off, the next morning, I had to ask the tradies taping off our cabin what was going on, and if we were in any danger to which they said they were just digging holes at 8am at the back of our cabin. Never again!
Loved staying here! So many kangaroos around — it felt magical 😍 The park is clean, peaceful, and super close to the beach 🌊 Perfect getaway spot!
There’s always wildlife inside the park, which is beautiful. Great location and a nice heated pool!
Great Place to stay
Staff where great, Amenities neat,clean and usable,the wild life are friendly. But the beach it was fantastic.
The kangaroos are a real highlight. Love the onsite cafe and store, very handy. Looking forward to coming back in the warmer weather to use the facilities properly and enjoy the beach.
Nice and spacious rooms. Heaps of parking areas.

It’s a very large and very well run park right on an extremely pretty beach. The cafe is excellent value but does close relatively early for dinner. We saw echidnas, goannas, and kangaroos all walking past our campsite. One word of advice is it’s a big park so try and get something closer to the amenities blocks.
Great location and facilities. Right on the beach. Cafe and great place for kids with pool and water park.

Absolutely brilliant park, extremely well maintained. Lovely staff, very accommodating
Powered ensuite site was excellent and storage room( attached) was very handy. Kids loved it, hardly saw them, they had too many things to do in the park! We were 3 generations, eldest 78 youngest 10 and all were well catered for. Great pools, plenty of wildlife and a short stroll , (about 50m,) to the beach. Kids road bikes, played on all the equipment, joined kids activities and watched movies on the big screen. Highly reccomend. Friends stayed in a cabin and were very impressed too
這次入住感覺非常好！有一晚房間的風筒壞了，本來已經很晚，管理員都下班了，但仍然特意下來幫我處理，服務態度非常貼心，真係好感動。酒店外觀和環境也很漂亮，森林小屋的風格很有特色，住起來既舒適又有度假感。整體體驗超出預期，非常滿意！

Beautiful place to stay, you have the beach right behind the park and can hear the waves at night. 2nd time here and stayed in a cabin for the first time. Cabin was spacious and cosy, but the pest control? Wow, it was woeful to be perfectly honest. Found 3 daddy long legs along with 2 cockroaches and at least 4 bull ants in the cabin. Yes it is next to the beach so creepy crawlies will be around but not in a cabin please. Kangaroos were friendly which was awesome. Also was able to see a goanna, echidna and ducks with their babies. Nature and wildlife are beautiful in the area and would recommend staying here.
Fab place for the family
A quiet time and very happy with the cabin and the facilities available

Absolutely loved this place, the cabin was comfortable and cosy, staff friendly and helpful and wildlife was in abundance.  We had pizza in Cafe & it was great too!  Can’t fault the place & will definitely be back if travelling through.

We had a beautiful 8 night stay here. Seeing lots friendly kangaroos, joeys and lorikeets  throughout the day was so special.  The cleanliness of the facilities and friendly staff was excellent too.
As well as the beautiful beach and river walk on our doorstep, and nearby township of Pambula.  I would never be bored. Thank you so much.

Discovery Parks Pambula:|Excellent accommodation! The staff were consistently helpful and professional during our entire stay. A special shoutout to the team member who went above and beyond to support us and address our needs. We stayed in August 2024.|Highly recommended!

Great stay..the park is well maintained, the amenities are clean and showers 🚿 are 🔥..
Pambula Beach itself ⛱️ 😎 is super long and fantastic for those long walks..
We have enjoyed our stay..
Thank you 😊
Had great time great location. Enjoyed cocktail happy hour at aqua to wind down before dinner.

If I was traveling with kids this would be wonderful- lots of family fun options like mini golf, games room, waterpark etc. including easy access to the beautiful beach with very calm waters. For a solo traveller, not the best. I was hoping to get some work done in the evening however there was no wifi (the add listed free wifi) and very little mobile reception. The cabin was dark, smelt of burnt meat (very unpleasant as a vegetarian), dishes/cutlery were dirty, and overall not as clean as I would expect. A bit disappointed.
Our accommodation was very good. Clean and the staff was very friendly and helpful. Will come again.

Wir verbrachten eine Nacht im März mit unserem SUV+Dachzelt hier und waren sehr zufrieden mit unserem Site Nummer A32. Es war nah zum Strand gelegen, sodass wir tagsüber schnell ins Meer konnten und nachts noch das Rauschen gehört haben. Die Sanitäranlagen waren sauber. Überall hoppelten Kängurus rum.
Really lovely clean well set out  cabins. They also had dishwasher and washing machine and dryer.  Whole area set up really well.
A great park at a great price. This park has better facilities than others eg Tathra, at a much better price. We loved the hot showers and the heated bathroom floors.beach access v easy.

The Discovery Park is amazing! Tame kangaroos everywhere, which the girls can't get enough of. Even my son found them cute. The beach is literally 1 minute walk and a beautiful beach at that. There are two pools and a splash park. One which is heated and undercover for those rainy 🌧 days. I preferred sitting in the spa myself lol 😆|There is also a jumping pillow, playground, and a games room||The cafe is pretty good too. So much fun for the kids, they never got bored. It was raining on and off when we were there, but that didn't stop the kids from putting on their Gumboots and riding in the puddles. The cabin that we had was pretty basic but big enough for a family of 5 and met all our requirements. The only tip I would give is for the owners to put down some wood or rocks where the entry point is as when it's raining, mud builds up, so that way your shoes and deck stay clean. We take our shoes off inside ||

The campground is great with lots of facilities for everyone.
Wonderful shower stalls that are large & modern.
Fantastic location on the beach.

Stayed for 3 nights in the van on an ensuite site with two kids. Park was clean tidy and well maintained. Massive space for families of all sizes and plenty for the kids to do. Beach front site was great so the kids could play and climb the rocks and we could relax and fish at our leisure. Communal areas were super clean and all park patrons respected this and cleaned up after themselves. Plenty to do around the area and a short trip to Eden and Merimbula where there is more to be able to explore. Thank you for the amazing stay we will definitely be back for more holidays with our little family!

Thank you for a wonderful stay! We truly enjoyed our two nights away being surrounded by nature and seeing kangaroos up close made it extra special.
Staff were very helpful too:)
We will def come again.
Rasha and Alex.Q
Magic, beautiful & relaxing!!!!!✨✨✨✨✨

Needs improvement on the bathroom facilities
Why do the toilets don't have a brush?
You are forced to leave a mess for the next user
Excellent park, wildlife in the park very friendly. Lots for kids to do

No dogs? Really… we have 2 small well behaved dogs that travel with us everywhere.
Except here.
Most dogs are better behaved than
many children I have witnessed.
The park needs to update this outdated policy. It could be easily managed with a rule that evicted badly behaved dogs and owners If necessary.

We went camping here a couple of days ago and It's a lovely spot , don't get me wrong. |The kangaroos all over the place are a joy to see and there is more than enough for kids and adults to do. But my word we were packed in like sardines and when you settle down and less than 3 metres away someone is snoring their head off and kids are screaming is a bit much. We really didn't enjoy this aspect.

Absolutely fantastic park. I had no idea how big it was but even so it didn't feel busy or crowded at any point. Lots of space and amenities were excellent. Always clean and nice big grassy sites and great wildlife too. Heaps for the kids to do too which was nice. We even extended our stay we liked it here so much. Thanks heaps you guys!
Very big park ,our site was concrete,but so much dirt around

Pambula Beach Discovery Park has become my new favourite. We traveled down from Sydney for 3 nights which was not enough time.

THE PARK: The park is huge, clean and well maintained. It is kid friendly with lots to do and plenty of while life to keep everyone entertained. We were camping on a powered site right in front of the beach (beach access via a path way). The grass camp sights were spacious and only a short walk to all facilities. The park has plenty of showers, toilets, and access to hot water and laundry facilities.

LOCATION: The park is in the perfect location, it is central to everything. You’re a short drive to Eden, Merimbula, or you can take a day trip to Nelson Lagoon, Tarthra and Mystery Bay! It’s a 1km beach walk to Pambula Rivermouth (absolutely sensational refer to photo 4) or you can take a 2 min drive to get there.

We will definitely be back!
Loads of kids, super family friendly, right next to the beach, but oh man those kids stay up late and out playing loud. You don't want to stay there if you want to go to bed 'early'(11pm)
What a great place for families! Pool, waterlines, playground. Even at the far end of the park away from all the amenities it was great.
Fantastic Caravan Park

Excele.nte ubicación para un gran Spot. Imperdible es la multitud de kanguros que se pasea por el camping!
Camping muy limpio y con muchas actividades para niños

I've visited a few times over the last 4 years, and my most recent stay was probably the most disappointing. Stayed in a Superior 2 bedroom unit right next to the eater park, and the beds were clean but old and very uncomfortable. I even tried one of the bunk beds out of desperation. It's hard to have a good break when you can't sleep well.
Facilities are good, though you'd be best to bring your own utensils, alfoil, paper towel, and cling wrap.
Plenty of staff working to maintain the park and keep everything running smoothly.
The small convenience store is not air-conditioned ( it didn't appear to be), so the shelf items weren't appealing.
Kids' activities are well organised and the beach is very close. I'll go again, but I'll be checking that the beds are newer next time.

Booked an economy cabin here to glam up our weekend of roughing it in our swag and it was exactly what we needed. Super tidy and cozy, loved having the beach so close to our cabin! The amenities and activities are awesome, even if the weather was yucky we couldn't be bored here. Beds are very comfortable and extra blankets provided if needed too. Shower had lots of hot water and great preassure too. Don't have any doubts if you want to book an economy cabin here, it was exactly what me and my partner needed for the night, hoping to come back and stay longer next time!! (Loved seeing all the local beers and spirits on the in house restaurant menu also! When we come back with some spending money we'll be dining in for sure!)

This is our favourite park on the sapphire coast. We stayed down the back by the basketball court although far away from cafe and beach (not too far just not as close as others) we loved the spot due to the amazing wildlife and huge caravan sites. The park was super busy but down there felt quiet.
Great to have an on site cafe. We loved the quiz night. A short drive over the hill takes you to the river mouth which is absolutely stunning. We did have a mess around with a double payment that came out but Sharon was a huge help and got it sorted for us. The pool is big and water park is awesome. Good kids club too. We can’t wait for our next visit!
It is a great holiday park with many activities and a great atmosphere.

My family have been camping here for over a decade but this year will be my last. The park has increasingly become unmanageable with parties into the early hours of the morning and literally wall to wall bikes, scooters and even electric vehicles everywhere including the footpaths. I was hit in the back by a kid on a bike and nearly collected by another the next day. The noise in the park is such that you can’t hear yourself think, read a book or focus on anything for long. Don’t count on internet either. There is barely reception most days no matter what you use - theirs or mobile. The shop is very overpriced so best to shop in Merimbula or at the Pambula supermarket. The park has all the things but unfortunately at peak season it is a tent city on steroids with park staff who don’t appear to enforce curfews or safety restrictions. The toilets were cleaned at peak times when busy but very dirty. Yes even the women’s toilets. The showers almost always wall to wall sand. Every second van had a leaf blower so that was the sound of your morning coffee. They have planted a large thorny hedge next to the highly trafficked amenities path, which you had to walk around or lose skin. It was finally cut back on our last day but should be removed. I counted the days to go home, exhausted from lack of sleep or rest from chaotic noise. Even my husband who can sleep through almost anything found it over the top. The kids start up early and loud so the curfew is pretty crucial to enjoy a ‘holiday’.
Very good plave for holidays with kids.

A very good accomodation with excellent cabins to accomodate small and big families. We stayed for 3 nights and throughly enjoyed the beach access, the pool, spa and the children’s play areas. The restaurant at the entrance is also very decent and good recommendation to try for breakfasts. All in all a very good stay worth recommending to anyone who wants to have a full camping style accomodation experience with the added benefit of being close to the beach!

Great facilities and amazing location.
Lots of wildlife freindly but messy.

The best stay ever.. the cabin is clean and fully equipped with everything a family needs. Water park is lots of fun and the indoor swimming pool and spa is super fun. The water park has slides and was lots of fun for the kids.
The beach was right behind the cabin. It was soo clear and loved every second spent there. Definitely recommended for every family looking to spend a great time.

Pambula beach Discovery Park is possibly one of the nicest parks we have stayed in.
The location and views of the patrolled beach are perfect.
The camp ground is beautifully maintained and the facilities for entertaining children of all ages are excellent.
We ate at the little restaurant at the entrance to the park and would really recommended a visit.
For a true blue Ozzie experience, the presence of a very friendly mob of kangaroos, will delight one and all.
Enjoyed our stay and will return.
Beautiful location right on the beach and headland.  Fishing snorkelling.  Has a licensed cafe near that has cocktails.  We have a powered RV site with on-suite that also has a storage shed.
Beautiful family park. Very close to the beach.

Absolutely stoked with this holiday destination been here 14 times now and it doesn't get much better then this. Where ever you stay always within 100m of the beach. The staff are lovely and facilities aren't bad at all. My only complaint is the toilet paper. Highly recommend staying here!!

We visit this lovely park every year as a family and it is the perfect getaway. Great facilities esp the heated pool in cooler weather, so close to the beach, cliff walk views and lots of activities for kids big & small. A special thanks to Loreen, who was so kind and welcoming to my daughter and her friends, who had their holiday plans changed with no notice while travelling to a different part of the coast. 1 call to Loreen and she organised cabins and went the extra mile to make sure they had a great stay. Highly recommend.

We spent 2 nights in a cabin here, as we travelled south in early November on our motorbikes. Could have stayed a month and not got bored of the place. Mind you the kangaroos added to my delight in the place. Loved sitting with coffee on the steps watching them hop through and laze around. The facilities were great and the staff awesome. On my list of worthy places to return to!

Beautiful location, cabin was perfect, the beach was about a 300 metre walk from our cabin, crystal clear water and stunning. Facilities were great, brilliant location for kids small and large.
We will be returning.
I have always bought my cleanning stuff to clean when I stay at places .however this was a great Great cabin and the cleanest ever thank you so much . 😊will come sgain it’s awesome

Booked a powered campsite, for a short weekend get away to unwind and relax from the city.
It’s a wonderful location to pitch your tent.  I would highly recommend!

Der beste campground in Australien bisher... Und wir waren bisher auf ca. 70!!! Großzügige sites, powered! - reinste amenities!!! Getrennte showers und toilets!!!, keine geruchsbelästigung, showers und toilets in grosser Anzahl, akribisch gereinigt, indoor pool!!!, pool Landschaft aussen, Kinderspielplatz und, und und... Direkter Strandzugang nicht zu vergessen, sowie feste cabins. Wirklich vorbildhaft und zu empfehlen... Und dazu noch billig, 36 $ 2 adults, powered site.

Best place for holidays with family. Very friendly and attentive staff. Very clean cabins.
Great entertainment for kids and everything is safe!
Great place to stay, management and staff are very helpful and great to deal with. Great little take away shop close by. Cabins clean and tidy

My wife, 2 kids (aged 2.5 and 4.5) and my mother-in-law initially were staying in Merimbula at Tasman holiday park as the facilities were ideal for our situation for the kids to have a bit of fun.

As we were running a bit behind schedule (Driving from South East Melbourne) we had to arrange for the key to the cabin be left in a letter box. Which the management was helpful with.

Unfortunately, as we arrived and walked in the cabin, we couldn’t last there a whole day as the cabin we booked, which was one of their better cabins (Kalinda Cabin 3BR) was putrid, dusty and the couch we couldn’t even sit on, it was that filthy. The park management was obliging and provided us a full refund the following morning as they agreed that the cabins were not in great condition and not up to scratch. The park was good facilities wise. But comfort in the cabins should be more focused on with that park I believe.

So, we needed to find somewhere for the next 5 nights pretty quickly. Which is when we then came across Discovery Parks - Pambula Beach.

I couldn’t commend the staff at reception enough. They understood our situation with the previous park and the cabin we were able to book was perfect, even on such short notice. It was a 3 bedroom, it was very clean and family appropriate items like the clothes dryer was a great assistance in keeping on top of the laundry.

It was nice after each night to crack open a cold one on the lovely clean COUCH when the kids went down to sleep.

The kids loved the heated pool, seeing all the many kangaroos in the park, on our last day, I had breakfast with one of the kangaroos and her Joey (Big fan of apples). Jumping pillow, little bit of mini golf. They loved riding there bikes around the park, which is well maintained. We went for walks on the beach to the Rockpool a couple of times to show our eldest that the water level isn’t always the same.

We were out and about everyday to explore the surrounding areas which was amazing seeing different wild life like whales, wallabies, starfish, crabs, lizards, the local cafes, breweries, shops etc were great also.

All staff were extremely friendly and I can’t thank the team at Discovery Parks - Pambula Beach enough from what was an awful start and then turned out to be an extremely memorable holiday for my family.

The only thing I can fault is having to make the bunk bed 🤣 though, it was probably the exercise I needed. Worked up a real sweat.

You guys are amazing ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️ ⭐️

Great park situated on the beach front with an indoor and outdoor pool.
Clean and tidy amenities.Friendly staff.
Lots of kangaroos around.
Awesome location, away from it all with all facilities needed (but no feeding the kangaroo's no matter how in your face they get!).
This place is the ultimate for families! So much to see and do. Fabulous clean and neat cabins and fantastic location
This is the best holiday place ever, great for young families for holiday time and great for oldies like us to just chill out and relax
Very good my family's favourite place to go
I absolutely love coming here with my parents in our caravan. It's amazing and the  beach is super close. I'm coming here next weekend (7th September) and I'm so excited.
Very friendly staff, clean toilets. We stayed on a powered caravan site, will be back.

Very average , the cabin I had was quite old , needed a big refurbishment , paint peeling , no freezer ,  just feelin quite tired , bed comfortable and facilities in the site are good for families … nice bush type setting listening to bell birds and wildlife about at night …

What a beautiful Caravan Park.
Right on the beach, with lots of activities for families with kids.
Very clean amenities, camp kitchen & laundry. All the staff were friendly and helpful. We stayed here in our caravan in August, so it was not overly crowded. 10/10.👍
Such a relaxing and beautiful  place on the beach. Was very happy with my stay at the caravan park
Great spot for families!!! Ocean is, great territory with kangaroos, playgrounds, and great food at Aqua cafe. Will come back during summer!!!!! 🎉🌎
Great location. Traveling through mid winter,  the place was empty which gave us an appreciation of the size of the place - it’s huge! excellent facilities.

We booked a cabin at this location during the recent school holidays,and drove from Victoria, and we are so happy that we made the right choice.
This place is best, you can ask for. Big park with all the amenities, you need whether you are camping or staying in cabins. As we stayed in cabin, it was very comfortable.
Beach just few steps away is awesome, and kangaroos as well.
Everything for kids to enjoy and explore.Shop for any urgent grocery is available. Pambula, Merimbula are great places to explore.

At the end we only had one regret, that our stay was short, we should have stayed for couple of more nights. But there is always a next time.
I have already recommended this place to all my friends.
I highly recommend.
Clean and tidy cabins. Served their purpose. Great view of beach. Close walk to surf club.

Facilities Ok, but lack of WiFi at park extremes is not right. I ran signal tests, If closer to reception we could get WiFi. So please do not advertise free WiFi if it’s not available to ALL customers. It’s the 21st century. Wifi is necessary! The accomodation has flat screen TV with the ability to receive WiFi which would allow customers to cast TV channels and watch better stuff than Ch9 in the evenings. Please get the WiFi fixed so it reaches all accommodations with enough power for reliable use of the service. Or stop advertising free internet.
Been here before.   Excellent park.
The best ever. Complete amenities and near my fave rivermouth in Pambula.
Nice, quiet and well priced for a perfect location

Nice park with good facilities and stayed here for a week in January the last two years in an ensuite caravan site. We rebooked for a 3rd year  and since decided to cancel booking as the kids were tired of the strict night rules imposed by security but the park has since requested and taken on board our feedback. I would recommend being 100% sure you can complete your trip/booking as there are quite strict cancellation fees or request a carry over or credit. They have been responsive in requesting feedback to make sure they are always improving the park mgt which is appreciated.
What a great weekend. Management and staff went above and beyond to make it the best experience you could have. Amenities were clean, the park very tidy. Will be back for another stay.
Nous avons été très bien accueilli après les horaires d’ouvertures ! Le camping est très bien. Seulement 30$.
Wonderful park. Very well maintained.great facilities. Best ensuite site we have been to. Lots of friendly kangaroos every day

Checked in on a Thursday for 7 nights and so far it has been good, only on the second night a bunch of noisy campers have turned up but they might leave soon due to the heavy rain and winds arriving tonight and they have done a bad job at setting up their tents and swags - fingers crossed. Besides that it’s a really good location and the weather will clear up by Monday morning and it will be good, also we have our own separate shower block and storage room right next to the van and it’s only a two minute walk to the beach. Overall the stay here has been very good and the weather has cleared up mostly, it’s a great location and clean, well looked after. The pricing is reasonable and will return soon.
Amazing location and the beach is beautiful. It’s such a shame though that the toilet blocks are so awful. They are not up to Big 4 standard. It’s shameful. Frankly disgusting.

Love this place,  camping here in our van, great facilities,  very clean,  wished we could stay longer.
Kangaroos everywhere. 😊

The park was quite big, has easy access to the beach and lots of different activities and amenities. I went down with my family and we were in 3 of the 2 bedroom deluxe spa cabins. We were a bit disappointed that when we arrived later than the estimated time we gave them one of the cabins weren't ready and they weren't cleaned thoroughly, had dirty dishes in the cupboards, food from previous guests in the cupboards and food scraps in the dish washer. The amenities were all amazing, had something for everyone in the family. The staff were all very lovely.
Excellent park. Highly recommended

This has to be one of the best parks I have stayed in. The location was fantastic being a stone throw from the beach. The accomodation cabin I stayed in was excellent being very clean and comfortable.|Great bed, excellent kitchen facilities for cooking. |Staff were friendly and checkin was a breeze. I had a truck and was able to park close to the cabin. |Loved the kangaroos that in habit the park.

On the way to Melbourne with American friends we stopped at Pambula beach park after reading about the. kangaroos on site. The cabins were spotless and the staff were friendly the bed was  comfortable the beach a couple hundred yards away, there are BBQ  and s small shop.The park has everything you could want for a long term stay with children we would definitely stay again.

This is a VERY big caravan park with lots of activities, so it's great for families.
We stayed on a powered site for a week in january and the park was full so it felt very busy and crammed in. Not really for us as a couple we prefer something smaller and less squashed.
The utilities were busy and at times had no available showers which was a bit annoying. I think this park would be better in the off season and the location next to the beach is fantastic.
We enjoyed staying but we did leave a couple of days early.

Amazing location! Very friendly staff and easy check in.  Bush cabin/villa was lovely overlooking the grasslands.  Our cabin was peaceful and in the nicest part of the park.  Only complaint was kitchen needed a few more things like a chopping board, containers that things could be stored in the fridge.  Otherwise, fantastic stay, would definitely go back!!!

Love Pambula Beach and the location of this park is right on the beach. The park has excellent facilities and the grounds are full of friendly kangaroos. However, given that we are loyal G'day park members and booked and paid in full several weeks in advance, we were very disappointed that our caravan site was not suitable for our large van. It was downhill and all dirt/sand.
No grass, no slab. There were double size vacant slabs everywhere when we checked in and many were never used during our 4 night stay. Pambula is an expensive park and that type of van site is simply a rip.off. Would like to stay there again, but will not book again before checking where they intend to put us.

Great park.  Travelled as a couple January 2024 in our caravan.  Sites lovely and large.  Location one of the best.  All staff very friendly and helpful.  Was very busy time but still everything was maintained impeccably. This is our third time here and it never disappoints.  Very good for kids with splash parks, pools and spa.  Kiosk/cafe on site.  Wonderful place to visit and stay.  We will be back again. A little expensive during peak times, but I guess this is to be expected.

We came with our Caravan. It was a powered site and was a good size. It is a family orientated park and everyone we met followed the rules, which is great for a good night's sleep. Great activities for children & Adults alike.

One of the best caravan parks for kids going around. Prime location on the beach, countless kids activities, and resident kangaroos IN the park. But you pay for what you get though, it’s not cheap. Summer periods completely booked out every year. A bit of infrastructure starting to look tired and needs upgrading, however doesn’t impact experience too much.
Just brilliant

Stayed here 4 years in a row, 1st three years were a very good experience, this year 2023/24 different story... park full of groups of unruly teenagers who were completely unsupervised well into the night, vaping in common rooms (tv room and library room had pungent chemical smell), screaming up the steets at 10pm, climbing into locked rooms through high windows, 2 golf balls got thrown at my caravan, loud swearing... list goes on.

And we also had the misfortune of being put next to the caravan park kitchen/mess hall on the 5th of Jan, a party in there got way out of hand, excessive drinking and noise way past 10pm. Kids (6 and 8) couldn't sleep in van. Park management eventually put an end to it at 11pm and told the party goers they would be banned, hopefully he follows through with this.

I asked management for a refund and was bluntly and aggressively refused.

I recommend management hire proper security for when the park is fully booked as the current staff don't have the skills required to deal with large groups of drunk adults.

We won't be coming back.

The location is great with direct access to the beach. The staff are really nice and very helpful and friendly. The facilities are excellent, being clean and well maintained. It’s a huge park next to the State Forest. The downside is the kangaroos and associated poo everywhere. There are huge male kangaroos that come right up to the caravan and lie around on top of the hoses and power cords. I find very scary.  The female Roos and their joeys are quieter and less of a worry. My husband accidentally stepped in Roo poo and stepped it all around the caravan floor and in the runner mat which I then had to wash! I won’t come back. But that’s only me! It’s very popular here and I’m sure it will suit many people and their families.

Lovely camping site right on the beach. Good clean facilities.
Plentiful wildlife a bonus
Clean, all activities in the park are within walking range. Enough to keep the kids busy. Short stroll to the beach.

Loved our 3 day stay in our campertrailer. Great service from Isabella on our arrival. Lovely spoke close to facilities and the beach. All amenities were clean and fresh. Lots of close by walking and attractions
Just had 7 night one of the parks we have stayed at great to catch up with southcoast avan people
I don't want to comment because I would give away Australia's best kept hidden secret!

We had a wonderful 4 days at Discovery Parks - Pambula Beach, my kids were devastated to leave.|We booked a Deluxe 2 bedroom spa cabin. It is a little tight with three growing children however the park facilities meant that they needn't spend much time inside anyway!|The cabin was very clean and in good condition. The bathroom is huge and it was lovely to have washing facilities.|The water park was a little chilly in October, the indoor pool very warm... kids still very happy in both. There's a jumping pillow, playground, The Rage Cage for ball games, craft activities some days and many great areas for bikes and scooters.|We visited many local oyster farms, and stopped for lunch at Longstocking Brewery on Sunday. Live Music + lunch was a great way to spend Sunday afternoon.|We will definitely be back, hopefully when it's a little warmer.

We had an ensuite site for the night.  Clean and new. Courtesy bus to the pub. Great location.  Plenty of friendly roos.
The spa is open again!  Amazing facilities but unfortunately, everything is locked and closed by 1700, including pools and playgrounds.
Amazing holiday park
Gorgeous park. We stayed here in a motorhome. Bathrooms and showers were very clean. Beach is beautiful, loved the wildlife, and the shop onsite was very handy. Would definitely stay again.

Hey. This is the second visit to this park and most definitely won't be the last.
It is getting rarer to find caravan parkes of this size and quality that are based directly on the beach.
Huge range of accommodation types including en suite powered sites which I love.
Everything there to keep the kids entertained, including extras like movie nights in peak periods.
Very well equipped 'corner store' at ghe entrance of the park with fresh bread delivered daily and a reasonable price cafe/restaurant.
Highly recommended this place.
As dogs were not allowed in the park, the park is teaming with while life. Kangaroos Rosellas rabbits and many other birds.
What a beautiful park.  Right on a beautiful beach, wildlife in abundance.  Amenities plentiful and always clean.  Underfloor heating, great water pressure in showers,  would definitely recommend

Staying at Pambula beach discovery park was such a lovely experience! The park is vibrant and energetic and just a very short drive from Merimbula. With a pool, water park, playground and trampolines, the park is perfect for kids and the camp kitchen and our ensuite on our site were neat, clean and modern. Even though we arrived after reception had closed for the day, the late night staff were so friendly and accommodating, driving with us to our tent site and making sure we were all set up and okay. The park is also the home to many kangaroos who freely roam the park. Our lot was at the far end of the park and despite the amount of people within the park is was still quiet and peaceful at night and everyone was very kind and aware of each other. Pambula beach itself, literally right outside the park, is also a beautiful beach for walks and swims. I could not recommend the caravan park more, I will be back very soon!
Good!
Amazing stay. Cabin was equipped with all the amenities required for a week long stay. Everything was in great condition. Pity that the spa wasn't working.

This is a perfect caravan park for families to enjoy, fabulous beach location ⛱️lots of fun ,probably the most expensive van park ,we have visited but we took advantage of stay for 3 pay for 2 nights👍which made it more affordable for grey nomads ,who want to stay near the beach ⛱️. Sunrise is definitely worth the effort 👌 so enjoy your stay ,plenty of birdlife 🦜🦆🐦& wildlife 🦘🐇

Without a doubt 1 of the best caravan parks on the NSW South Coast. Cosy cabin with the BEST BED EVER!. Well appointed, the kangaroos are charming to watch, birds were lovely to listen to as were the waves from the beach. Very nice reception staff, good value and very child friendly. Highly recommended.

Absolutely one of the best places to stay with children. I'm back after a very long time. Park is beautiful, kangaroos still everywhere, very clean amenities, cabin is perfect and the sound of the waves very soothing. Will be back again. Highly recommended 👌.

We booked a powered campsite for one night here. We were able to connect to the Wi-Fi from our campsite. The campsite that we had was right next to the beach entrance about 1 minute walk. The "camp kitchen" has BBQ stations, sinks with dish detergent, fridge and freezer, stove top, but no appliances. The toilets and showers were really clean with hot water! There is a laundry station as well as drying station. There were also entertainments rooms! There were wild kangaroos everywhere!
It's the Sapphire Coastline, that's all needed to say Beautiful

Excellent location and 2 bedroom cabin was neat and tidy. Great park with beautiful friendly kangaroos and bird life.  Most facilities were good although the spa was unserviceable and there was some roadworks being done. It is a great location and we will definitely be back again in the warmer months

everything was perfect. had amazing facilities with big games room and inside and outside sitting areas. right on a beautiful beach. all staff were very friendly and enthusiastic to help. stayed in off season.
On site motor home.
UPDATED: Beautiful place . Would love to visit again anytime.

Love the location,staff were very nice at reception.Lots of good things around for children.
The issue that annoys me is that the phone doesn't work in the cabin,so no phone calls,or internet.The wifi doesn't work in the cabin either.
The cabin was poorly cleaned,with spiders and cobwebs everywhere,which isn't good enough

Great location. Clean and tidy. There are a variety of activities for adults and kids.

Our cabin smelled bleach when we arrived, which I personally preferred. Thanks to Cate, the cabin looks clean and tidy.

The big con   is that there is no internet reception in our cabin (52). If this doesn't matter to you, then it's all good !
clean & comfortable cabin, a brief walk to the beach and kangaroos roaming in the park all up a great place for a rest.
